    • getProcessInstanceIncidentStatistics

      public List<ProcessInstanceIncidentCountStatisticsDto> getProcessInstanceIncidentStatistics(ProcessInstanceIncidentCountRequestDto requestDto)
      Description copied from interface: IncidentRestService
      Retrieves statistics about incidents grouped by process instance, based on the provided request criteria.

      This endpoint accepts a ProcessInstanceIncidentCountRequestDto in the request body, which can specify various filters and grouping options. The response is a list of ProcessInstanceIncidentCountStatisticsDto objects, each representing aggregated incident statistics for process instances matching the criteria.

      Typical use cases include reporting, monitoring, or dashboarding scenarios where grouped or filtered incident counts are required for process instances.

      Specified by:
      getProcessInstanceIncidentStatistics in interface IncidentRestService
      Parameters:
      requestDto - the request object containing filtering and grouping criteria
      Returns:
      a list of statistics objects, each containing incident count information for a group of process instances
